# tollgate-infrastructure-kit

> A single-command Ansible-based toolkit that deploys all Tollgate-related infrastructure services on a single VPS. Designed so anyone can run Tollgate infrastructure without depending on a small set…

Project orientation for LLMs (see https://llmstxt.org/). Cross-link: AGENTS.md (workflow rules), HANDOVER.md (session state).

## Stack

Languages/build: npm/TS-JS, Make.

## Structure (top file types)

- `.yml`: 136 files
- `.py`: 58 files
- `.j2`: 52 files
- `.md`: 34 files
- `.sh`: 18 files
- `.ts`: 10 files

## Build & test

- Inspect `Makefile` / `package.json` / `Cargo.toml` / `platformio.ini` for the canonical commands.

## Optional

- [README](./README.md): human readme
